module.name: no-test-interface-declaration
module.description: Disallow interface declarations in test files; import production types instead.

scenarios.name: should report an interface declared in a test file
scenarios.given: interface IUser { name: string; } inside a .test.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the interface declaration

scenarios.name: should report an interface declared in a __tests__ directory file
scenarios.given: interface IMockService { call(): void; } inside a file under __tests__
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the interface declaration

scenarios.name: should report multiple interfaces in a single test file
scenarios.given: two interface declarations inside a .test.ts file
scenarios.then: a noTestInterfaceDeclaration violation is reported for each

scenarios.name: should allow interface declarations in production files
scenarios.given: interface IUser { name: string; } inside a non-test source file
scenarios.when: the rule creates listeners for the file
scenarios.then: no listeners are registered and no violation is reported

scenarios.name: should allow type aliases in test files
scenarios.given: type MockData = { value: number } inside a .test.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias declaration
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because it is not an interface
